description: Implement the Parent Graph (Batch Coordinator) which loads configurations, base resumes, and jobs, then orchestrates the Map-Reduce workflow by dispatching isolated child graphs using the LangGraph Send API.

userStories.title: Implement LoadConfigAndResumeNode
userStories.description: As a batch coordinator, I want to load configuration, base resumes, and the job tracker queue so that the Parent Graph is seeded with all necessary starting data.
acceptanceCriteria: Given the parent graph starts execution, When LoadConfigAndResumeNode runs, Then it reads job_tracker.json and parses the contents into JobTrackerEntry objects in the state.
Given the node runs, When it reads the json_resumes directory, Then it loads valid JSON files into BaseResumeSchema objects mapped by category in the state.

tasks.description: Implement load_config_and_resume logic to read job_tracker.json (or create a dummy one if missing)
Implement logic to read JSON base resumes from data/json_resumes/ and parse them via BaseResumeSchema
Write basic pytest for LoadConfigAndResumeNode in tests/test_parent_nodes.py

userStories.notes: Assume the prompts and config are dictionaries for now, or just focus on resumes and tracker queue.

userStories.title: Implement Subgraph Dispatch Mapper (Send API)
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want to use LangGraph's Send API to dispatch jobs into parallel sub-graphs so that multiple job applications can be processed concurrently with isolated state.
acceptanceCriteria: Given the ParentGraphState has scraped_jobs, When the map_to_job_processor edge function is called, Then it returns a list of Send objects targeting the child subgraph.
Given a job with a category, When the Send object is constructed, Then it passes the correctly matched BaseResumeSchema to the ChildGraphState.

tasks.description: Implement logic to match job.category to the appropriate base_resume
Write pytest to verify the mapping logic correctly generates Send objects

userStories.notes: We are passing scraped_jobs, but since JobIngestion is in F-05, we will need a dummy node or mock to move pending_jobs into scraped_jobs.

userStories.title: Compile Parent StateGraph
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want to compile the Parent StateGraph so that the pipeline flows correctly from state initialization to sub-graph dispatch.
acceptanceCriteria: Given the ParentGraphState, When defining the StateGraph, Then it connects START to load_config_and_resume.
Given the graph definition, When adding a stub job_ingestion node and the conditional Send edge, Then the graph compiles successfully.

tasks.description: Define the Parent StateGraph using ParentGraphState in src/graph.py
Add load_config_and_resume node and a stub job_ingestion node
Add conditional edges from job_ingestion using map_to_job_processor
Write test to compile and verify the parent graph structure

userStories.notes: The child subgraph isn't built yet (F-03), so use a stub node for 'process_job' to make the parent graph compile.
